artifact.source:
root = Card([heading, description, chartComp], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from logs/app.log", "lg", true)
heading = Heading("app.log ERROR rate", "h3")
description = Text("Log lines bucketed into 10-minute windows; count of ERROR-level lines per bucket.", "muted")
errorSeries = Query("log_series", {file: "logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: [{"bucket": "09:00", "count": 3}, {"bucket": "09:10", "count": 8}, {"bucket": "09:20", "count": 6}, {"bucket": "09:30", "count": 4}, {"bucket": "09:40", "count": 1}, {"bucket": "09:50", "count": 0}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})
chartComp = Chart("bar", errorSeries.data, errorSeries.x, errorSeries.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 340)

toolInput.title: Chart the error rate over time from a log file on disk
toolInput.markup:
root = Card([heading, description, chartComp], "Error Rate Over Time", "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket from logs/app.log", "lg", true)
heading = Heading("app.log ERROR rate", "h3")
description = Text("Log lines bucketed into 10-minute windows; count of ERROR-level lines per bucket.", "muted")
errorSeries = Query("log_series", {file: "logs/app.log", groupBy: "10m", match: "ERROR"}, {data: [{"bucket": "09:00", "count": 3}, {"bucket": "09:10", "count": 8}, {"bucket": "09:20", "count": 6}, {"bucket": "09:30", "count": 4}, {"bucket": "09:40", "count": 1}, {"bucket": "09:50", "count": 0}], x: "bucket", y: "count"})
chartComp = Chart("bar", errorSeries.data, errorSeries.x, errorSeries.y, "ERROR lines per 10-minute bucket", 340)
